Text:
One single continuous photograph — no panels, grids, or split frames.

Use the uploaded photo as the exact base composition. Remove all modern
businesses, logos, brands, storefront names, banners, advertisements, and
signage visible in the source image.

PRESERVE (must match source exactly)
- camera: eye-level, facing street-facing, fov 75
- commercial arterial road, 4-lane, asphalt
- sidewalks present, curbs present
- driveways: north driveway apron, south driveway apron; parking: open asphalt apron surrounding pump islands
- gas station canopy building at center lot over pump islands, 1 story, steel frame, corrugated metal fascia, flat roof, 30 feet from road setback
- service station office building at rear right corner, 1 story, concrete block, brick veneer, flat parapet roof, at parking apron setback
- open service bay building at rear left corner, 1 story, concrete block, gabled metal roof, at parking apron setback
- utilities: overhead power lines on wooden poles, transformer on northeast corner pole
- landscape: flat asphalt apron, painted concrete curbing, narrow grass strip at road edge
- immutable elements: canopy with four corner support posts, pump island with eight dispensers, north and south driveway aprons
Keep this location instantly recognizable.

OUTPUT FORMAT
Create a TRUE 9:16 vertical portrait image — one single frame. Expand the SAME
scene naturally above (sky) and below (street/pavement) — this is canvas
extension of one photograph, not additional panels. Do not stretch or distort
the source geometry.

TRANSFORM TO 1985
Reagan era prosperity. A 1985 self-service gas station — digital price sign newly installed, a small convenience store where the second service bay used to be.

PERIOD DETAILS
- credit card readers not yet at pump
- one remaining service bay with a 'STATE INSPECTION' sign
- price sign showing gas around $1.12
- main sign: an independent station sign in the style of Citgo
- window signs: 'HOT DOGS 2 FOR $1', 'CIGARETTES $1.10 PACK'
- an 'AIR & WATER' sign at the lot corner
- a BMX bike leaned by the store door
Typography: bold geometric sans-serif, early computer-influenced fonts.

PEOPLE
EXACTLY 4 people, spread out with empty areas.
- a clerk visible at the register through the store window
- a woman squeegeeing her windshield at the island
- a mother with two kids in tow
Clothing: men in shoulder pads in blazers, polo shirts with collars up; women in shoulder pads, leg warmers. Fashion palette: neon pink, electric blue, purple. No posing or eye contact.

VEHICLES
EXACTLY 3 period vehicles, all different:
- 1983-1987 Honda Accord — clean lines, pop-up headlights — red
- 1984-1988 Pontiac Fiero — small wedge two-seater — beige
- 1984-1987 Toyota Corolla — boxy compact, reliable look — light blue
Parked with gaps; optionally 1 driving; no vehicle newer than 1985.

ENVIRONMENT
- road markings: yellow center line, white edge lines, painted crosswalks
- utilities: overhead power lines standard, wooden utility poles

TREES
- cottonwood tree at northeast corner of lot: very young sapling
- elm tree at sidewalk edge left of entrance: very young sapling
- cedar tree at back fence line: young tree, thin trunk

PHOTOGRAPHIC STYLE
COLOR photograph — Kodacolor VR 200 or Fujicolor 100 look.
Color: slightly cool tones compared to 1970s. Grain: moderate grain, cleaner than 1975.
Photorealistic — NOT black-and-white, no HDR.

PRIVACY
Blur all faces and license plates.
SelectedVehicles: 1983-1987 Honda Accord — clean lines, pop-up headlights
1984-1987 Toyota Corolla — boxy compact, reliable look
